office_does: The county commission sets county policy, adopts the budget, and oversees county services and operations.
race_blurb: Appointed commissioner JR Streifel faces local business owner and drainage-district commissioner Stan Sturgeon; Gordon E. Mitchell is no longer listed on the current official active-primary list.

candidates.summary: Mitchell appears in the research manifest but not on the current official active-primary list.
highlights: The approved official source no longer establishes active ballot status [S1].

candidates.summary: Streifel is the appointed incumbent commissioner and a former firefighter and school-board member who emphasizes services, safety, development, and accountable operations.
highlights: Serves as the appointed incumbent commissioner [S1].
Emphasizes collaboration, safety, services, development, and accountable operations [S1].

spending.basis: His emphasis on accountable operations supports a modest oversight direction.

experience.basis: He is the appointed incumbent with additional firefighter and school-board service.

candidates.summary: Sturgeon is a local business owner and drainage-district commissioner emphasizing jobs, partnerships, community policing, and affordable housing.
highlights: Has business, flood-control, and drainage-district experience [S1].
Emphasizes small-business growth, community policing, and affordable-housing partnerships [S1].

safety.basis: His stated public-safety priority is community policing.

experience.basis: He brings local district and community experience but no documented county-commission record.
